member.name: T:Alphabet.Modules.CommunicationModule.Api.CommunicationModuleEndpoints
member.summary: Maps communication endpoints for sending alerts, notifications, and user messages.

member.name: M:Alphabet.Modules.CommunicationModule.Api.CommunicationModuleEndpoints.MapCommunicationModule(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Registers communication endpoints for the module.
